series_metadata.series_description: Documents including: Policy recommendation memos, Drafts, Correspondence, Research, Working group documents(rosters, minutes, surveys, review drafts, recommendations), News releases.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in office area for 1 year after it is superseded, obsolete or rescinded, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain in office area for 1 year after it is superseded, obsolete or rescinded, then destroy., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
